name: Supplier Performance Total Cost of Ownership
description: Industrial-grade TCO model for supplier evaluation incorporating quality, logistics, and lifecycle costs per ISO 14040, Lean, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Purchase Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Negotiated unit price from supplier contract.

businessContext_i18n.en: Negotiated unit price from supplier contract.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçi sözleşmesinden müzakere edilen birim fiyat.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix unitaire négocié dans le contrat fournisseur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio unitario negociado del contrato con el proveedor.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités achetées par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de unidades compradas por año.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Parts per million defective, Six Sigma metric.

businessContext_i18n.en: Parts per million defective, Six Sigma metric.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milyonda hatalı parça sayısı, Altı Sigma metriği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Teile pro Million fehlerhaft, Six Sigma-Kennzahl.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pièces par million défectueuses, métrique Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Partes por millón defectuosas, métrica de Seis Sigma.

inputs.label: Inspection Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of incoming quality inspection per unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of incoming quality inspection per unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına gelen kalite muayene maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de l'inspection qualité à l'arrivée par unité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de inspección de calidad entrante por unidad.

inputs.label: Freight Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average shipping cost per unit from supplier.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average shipping cost per unit from supplier.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçiden birim başına ortalama nakliye maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Versandkosten pro Einheit vom Lieferanten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'expédition moyen par unité depuis le fournisseur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio de envío por unidad desde el proveedor.

inputs.label: Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Supplier lead time from order to delivery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Supplier lead time from order to delivery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçinin siparişten teslimata kadar geçen süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lieferzeit vom Lieferanten von Bestellung bis Lieferung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Délai de livraison du fournisseur de la commande à la livraison.
businessContext_i18n.es: Plazo de entrega del proveedor desde el pedido hasta la entrega.

inputs.label: Inventory Carrying Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inventory holding cost as percentage of unit cost (Lean metric).

label_i18n.fr: Taux de coût de possession des stocks
label_i18n.es: Tasa de costo de mantenimiento de inventario

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual inventory holding cost as percentage of unit cost (Lean metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim maliyetin yüzdesi olarak yıllık stok bulundurma maliyeti (Yalın metrik).
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Lagerhaltungskosten als Prozentsatz der Stückkosten (Lean-Kennzahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel de détention des stocks en pourcentage du coût unitaire (métrique Lean).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual de mantenimiento de inventario como porcentaje del costo unitario (métrica Lean).

inputs.label: Warranty Claim Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units that result in warranty claims.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units that result in warranty claims.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Einheiten, die zu Garantieansprüchen führen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités donnant lieu à des réclamations sous garantie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades que resultan en reclamaciones de garantía.

rules.message: Defect rate must be between 0 and 100,000 ppm.
Carrying cost rate must be between 0% and 100%.
If environmental cost is included, CO2 and carbon tax must be non-negative.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds 1000 ppm; consider supplier quality improvement (Six Sigma).
TCO per unit exceeds 150% of purchase price; review supplier performance.
Lead time exceeds 60 days; risk of inventory stockout (Lean JIT).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
